speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have experience in advertising ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I used to have a part-time job in advertising company .

speaker: speaker1
text: What were you mean duties there ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What qualities do you think an advertising planner should have ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I think an advertising planner should have active thoughts , creative talent , and be sensitive to the changes in the market .

speaker: speaker1
text: What was the most important thing you have learned at work ?

speaker: speaker2
text: The most important thing I learned was that I must continuously improve my abilities . Advertising is a constantly evolving trade and creativity is an important fact to success . If I want to make in marking in advertising industry , I can ’ t stop studying and creating .
